title: Junior Software Engineer (AI-Native)
company_focus:
Streamlining property transactions and real estate
technology
description:
About Homey

Moving home in the UK is notoriously slow and stressful. At
Homey, we are changing that. We are an established, fast-
growing business using technology to streamline property
transactions, making the process faster, more transparent,
and more efficient for everyone involved.

Check us out at Homey.co.uk.

The Role

We aren't looking for 10 years of legacy experience. We are
looking for smart, adaptable, and ambitious
engineers—whether you’ve just graduated, finished school, or
are early in your coding journey.

At Homey, we don't care if you haven't memorized every
syntax rule—we care that you know how to build things fast.
We are looking for "AI-Native" engineers: people who see
LLMs (like Claude Code, Grok, or GitHub Copilot) as their
superpower to ship high-quality code at speed.

Requirements

Build & Iterate: Develop and maintain features that directly
impact how people buy and sell homes.

Leverage AI: Use modern AI coding agents and LLMs to
accelerate your workflow, debug complex issues, and explore
new solutions.

Problem Solve: Take ownership of tasks from day one with a
"can-do" attitude—if you don't know the answer, you'll find
it.

Collaborate: Work closely with a nimble team that values
fresh perspectives and creative thinking.

Who You Are

Early Career: You are a recent graduate, school leaver, or
junior dev looking for a place to grow.

Tech Enthusiast: You aren't just "aware" of AI; you are
actively using tools like Claude Code, Grok, or Cursorto
write and refine your projects.

High Energy: You have a "can-do" mindset. No task is too
small, and no challenge is too big.

Curious: You have a genuine interest in how technology can
disrupt a traditional industry like real estate.

Benefits

Work at an established company with the soul of a startup.

Mentorship from experienced founders who value modern
development workflows.

The chance to solve a real-world problem that affects
millions of people.

Ready to build the future of property? Apply with a link to
your GitHub, a project you’ve built using AI, or just a note
on why you’re the right fit for Homey.
responsibilities: Develop and maintain features for property buying and selling platform
Leverage AI coding agents and LLMs to accelerate development workflow
Debug complex issues and explore new solutions using AI tools
Take ownership of tasks and deliver features end-to-end
Collaborate with team members on product development
Build technology solutions that disrupt traditional real estate industry
use_cases: Home buying and selling process automation
ai_classification_reasoning:
This is a general software engineering role at a proptech
company. The role uses LLMs like Claude Code, Grok, and
GitHub Copilot as productivity tools to write code faster,
but does not involve building, training, fine-tuning, or
deploying AI/ML models. The AI tools are used to support
software development, not to create AI systems.
